title: N11 Product Scraper Input
description: Scrape N11 search, category, or direct product URLs.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Search terms to run on n11.com. At least one input source is required.

categoryUrls.title: Category URLs
categoryUrls.description: N11 category or listing URLs to crawl.

productUrls.title: Product URLs
productUrls.description: Direct N11 product URLs to scrape.

maxProducts.title: Max Products
maxProducts.description: Maximum number of products to emit into the dataset.

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape Details
scrapeDetails.description: When enabled, the actor fetches product descriptions and extra detail enrichments in addition to the core product page.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential proxies with Turkish IP preference are used by default.
